location: Behind a Stonesword Key-locked door in Black Knife Catacombs, northeastern Liurnia of the Lakes. From the entrance, go down the stairs and turn left twice to find an imp-statue door at the bottom; inside, the axe rests on a corpse propped against a tomb.

source.name: Corpse (behind Stonesword Key door, Black Knife Catacombs)

tactics: Requires 1 Stonesword Key to open the imp-statue door — bring one before heading down or you'll need to backtrack
Two skeleton enemies guard the room; catacomb skeletons revive unless finished with a follow-up hit or Holy/Fire damage, so don't just knock one down and walk past it
The dungeon's boss, Cemetery Shade, is down a separate path — you don't need to fight it to reach this room, only to find the correct side passage before the boss fog gate
lore: A ritual axe decorated with the likeness of Rosus, an usher of death said to guide the deceased safely through the Lands Between's many catacombs so they don't lose their way.

builds.name: Strength/Intelligence hybrid
builds.why: Splits scaling across Strength, Dexterity, and Intelligence with added innate magic damage, making it a viable melee option for a Strength build that's also leaning into Intelligence.

builds.name: Rosus's Summons skill build
builds.why: Its unique skill hits harder than the similar Tibia's Summons sorcery and carries a melee hitbox, giving even a non-caster build a strong burst option if they have spare Intelligence.
